creator: bja@nlaudits.com
text:
During install, sysinstall will fail to find and install man pages, english language documentation, ports, or source code via CDROM install or FTP install from ftp.freebsd.org. The base system appeared to install fine (well enough to allow me to sync the source code with csup and rebuild world to gain access to documentation and whatever else was missing).

Fix: 

A workaround exists by installing as much of the base and developer distributions as possible and then using csup to gain a copy of the source code and ports tree. This can then be used to rebuild the world and install any missing documentation.
How-To-Repeat: Attempt to install FreeBSD 8.1-RELEASE for PowerPC using a CD-ROM or FTP install source.
